name: auto-beamer
description: AutoBeamer — AI-powered XeLaTeX Beamer slide system with layout optimizer, design grammar checker, source-document-first image policy, and agent skills for passive-study, active-socratic, academic-presentation, and problem-sheet decks.

interface.shortDescription: Three-mode Beamer deck system with layout and review skills
interface.longDescription: AutoBeamer replaces guesswork with a systematic pipeline for building Beamer decks. It supports passive-study, active-socratic, and academic-presentation modes, source-document-first image extraction, a three-tier template library, a four-layer layout optimizer, a design grammar checker, and 7 AI agent skills for creation, layout, build, review, TikZ, validation, and environment doctoring.
defaultPrompt: Create a passive-study Beamer deck from my research paper using source-document-first figures
Build an active-socratic deck that guides learners through questions and attempts
Prepare an academic-presentation deck for sharing this work in a seminar
